description: This pipeline splits the input data by a specified annotation or filters data based on the annotation value and then outputs the split data. The main steps include taking in the input data, splitting it based on annotations, and outputting the split data. The pipeline starts with the 'annotate-split-by-annotation' node and ends with the 'ij1-roi-filter-by-overlap' node.

df07ba4f-293f-46ae-bc7a-9092ebc524e8.name: ij1-roi-filter-by-overlap
df07ba4f-293f-46ae-bc7a-9092ebc524e8.description:
Filters the ROI lists by testing for mutual overlap. The ROI1 output contains all ROI1 input ROI that overlap with any of ROI2. The ROI2 output contains all ROI2 input ROI that overlap with a ROI1 ROI.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

9a96cf17-6c8f-424b-8eb4-6817d55b874e.name: annotate-split-by-annotation
9a96cf17-6c8f-424b-8eb4-6817d55b874e.description: Splits the input data by a specified annotation or filters data based on the annotation value.
